prompt:


2. Fix the actual code that has the bug

raw_response:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Accessibility Fix</title>
</head>
<body>
    <form>
        <label for="no-id">Email Address:</label>
        <input type="email" id="no-id" name="email_address">

processed_code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Accessibility Fix</title>
</head>
<body>
    <form>
        <label for="no-id">Email Address:</label>
        <input type="email" id="no-id" name="email_address">
    </form>
</body>
</html>
